channel.title: Operating-System on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Operating-System on Arrans github.io

item.title: klange/toaruos
item.description: A completely-from-scratch hobby operating system: bootloader, kernel, drivers, C library, and userspace including a composited graphical UI, dynamic linker, syntax-highlighting text editor, network stack, etc.

item.title: HeyPuter/puter
item.description: 🌐 The Internet Computer! Free, Open-Source, and Self-Hostable.

item.title: armbian/build
item.description: The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.
